title: centaurea rouyi
intro: Centaurea rouyi, a perennial plant native to China, belongs to the Asteraceae family and is commonly known as the Rouy's knapweed or Rouy's centaury. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, attributed with medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Centaurea rouyi include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
